title: Keep live_component state in sync with parent source of truth
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/tasks_board_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TasksBoardLive). The parent owns @tasks (a list). Child is <.live_component module={MyAppWeb.TaskCardComponent} id={"task-#{task.id}"} task={task} /> inside a :for loop. The parent handles handle_event("reorder", ...) that updates @tasks. The child component MUST NOT keep its own copy of task — it always reads from assigns. On a task edit, the child uses send(self(), {:task_updated, task}) to notify the parent. The parent updates @tasks and the component re-renders. Parent is source of truth.
tier_rationale: Requires explicit source-of-truth decision + coordinator pattern.
